subcodes.first_line: O thou my heavenly daughter! The letter which thou hast written on the 10th was received. Convey my greetings to the revered Suzanne Ferriere.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر ملکوتی من نامه که دهم سبتمبر ۱۹۲۰ مرقوم نموده بودی رسید بسوزان فریر
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @universality of the Cause, @the Lesser Peace and the Most Great Peace, @unity; oneness of humanity
